hero.name: Rachel
hero.title: Computer Science Student
hero.subtitle: Developer & Designer
hero.description: Crafting innovative solutions at the intersection of Web Development, AI/ML, FinTech, and MedTech. Passionate about building technology that makes a difference.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Computer Science student with a passion for building impactful technology. My journey spans across multiple domains, from creating intuitive web applications to developing AI-powered solutions that solve real-world problems.
With experience in medical technology and financial systems, I bring a unique perspective to software development, always considering the human impact behind every line of code.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring graphic design, photography, and illustration — bringing a creative eye to technical challenges.
